evals.name: dom_parsing_basic
evals.description: 基础 DOM 解析 - 简单表单
evals.prompt: Parse a simple HTML form with 3 input fields (email, password, confirm) and 1 submit button. Return the structured DOM text with element indices.

evals.name: dom_parsing_nested
evals.description: 嵌套 DOM 解析 - 复杂层级
evals.prompt: Parse a nested HTML structure with a form inside a modal dialog. The form has 2 input fields and a submit button. Return the DOM text preserving the hierarchy.

evals.name: response_normalization_json_in_content
evals.description: 响应修复 - JSON 在 content 中
evals.prompt: Fix an LLM response where the JSON action is in the message.content field instead of tool_calls. The JSON is: {"action": "click_element", "index": 0}

evals.name: response_normalization_double_json
evals.description: 响应修复 - 双层 JSON
evals.prompt: Fix an LLM response with double-encoded JSON: {"action": "{\"click_element\": 0}"}

evals.name: response_normalization_nested_function
evals.description: 响应修复 - 嵌套函数调用
evals.prompt: Fix an LLM response with nested function call format: {"type": "function", "function": {"name": "AgentOutput", "arguments": "{\"action\": \"input_text\", \"index\": 1, \"text\": \"hello\"}"}}

evals.name: history_reflection_simple
evals.description: 历史反思 - 简单场景
evals.prompt: Generate a reflection from a 3-step execution history: step 1 (click_element, success), step 2 (input_text, success), step 3 (click_element, success). Extract the current state and next goal.

evals.name: history_reflection_with_failures
evals.description: 历史反思 - 包含失败
evals.prompt: Generate a reflection from a 5-step execution history with 2 failures: step 1 (click, success), step 2 (input, failed), step 3 (wait, success), step 4 (input, success), step 5 (click, success). Infer the current state and recovery strategy.

evals.name: history_reflection_sensitive_data
evals.description: 历史反思 - 敏感信息隐藏
evals.prompt: Generate a reflection from a history where step 2 contains input_text with 'password123' and step 3 contains 'user@example.com'. Verify that sensitive information is properly masked in the memory output.

evals.name: tool_execution_click
evals.description: 工具执行 - 点击操作
evals.prompt: Simulate clicking element at index 0. The element is a button with text 'Submit'. Verify that the operation returns success and the observation mentions the button was clicked.

evals.name: tool_execution_input
evals.description: 工具执行 - 输入操作
evals.prompt: Simulate inputting text 'user@example.com' into element at index 1. The element is an email input field. Verify that the operation returns success and the observation mentions the text was entered.
